ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Time the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in this order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this order item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in this order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department this product belongs to */,
  "aisle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aisle this product belongs to */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_aisle_id FOREIGN KEY ("aisle_id") REFERENCES aisles ("aisle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_frequency" (
  "order_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order frequency record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this record belongs to */,
  "days_since_prior_order" INTEGER /* Number of days since the user's prior order */,
  "reordered" INTEGER /* Whether the user has reordered this product before */,
  "order_count" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_frequency_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aisles" (
  "aisle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aisle */,
  "aisle_name" TEXT /* Name of the aisle */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department this aisle belongs to */,
  "aisle_description" TEXT /* Description of the aisle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aisle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aisles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_to_subcategory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time the order status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
